name: Roasted Poblano Vinaigrette (Gr)
recipeIngredient: 2 poblano peppers, roasted, peeled and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the roasted poblano peppers, chopped onion, and lime juice. Blend until smooth.
2. While blending, slowly add the olive oil until emulsified.
3. Add the spinach and blend until smooth.
4. Add the honey and season to taste with salt and freshly ground pepper.
5. Allow the vinaigrette to come to room temperature before serving.
Yield: about 1 1/2 cups
